chunks.content:
Article: MANGA ISIK Shipping
[]: [ISIK] "Shipping"             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Jan 04, 2007 5:10 pm So, for anybody who reads this, what's the status "shipping"-wise in this manga? According to Leaky, both GoS2 manga AND the Ikari Shinji manga supposedly take the Asuka/Shinji route (Which GoS2 does, as I've read volumes 4 & 6 raw. (didn't bother with 5 as that just talks about Gendou/Yui and Kaworu in their middle school days (the cover's a dead giveaway to this) and I'd rather wait for that to be translated)) , but then THAT BOARD states it's acutally Rei/Shinji. Is this "trrue"? :? Even if it is Rei/Shinji, I don't care, hell, as long as the artwork and story is good, I'll read this series. I'm just wondering is all. That'd be cool if there'd be a manga out there that would be Kaworu/Shinji, but it'd probably be queer-Kaworu-kun than femme-Kaworu-kun. :( (I want to see people acknowledge the truth in this fanwankery, damn it! )

[]:             Quote Post by CyborgZeta » Thu Jan 04, 2007 6:26 pm Well, Wikipedia lists Rei as being "Shinji's love interest" in the manga. Buuuut....it is Wikipedia, so you might want to take it with a grain of salt. >_>;

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Jan 04, 2007 6:49 pm [url]http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Asuka_Langley_Soryu#Asuka.27s_interactions_with_Shinji[/url] wrote: In Evangelion fanfiction, Asuka and Shinji are often paired as a couple, despite the conflicts their personality disorders cause. This pairing has also made its way to the manga versions of Girlfriend of Steel 2 and Shinji Ikari Raising Project.

[]:             Quote Post by CyborgZeta » Thu Jan 04, 2007 6:50 pm Gomen. Shinji Ikari Raising Project Here you go.

[]:             Quote Post by Ejinathan » Tue Jan 09,

Article: MANGA ISIK Shipping
borgZeta » Thu Jan 04, 2007 6:50 pm Gomen. Shinji Ikari Raising Project Here you go.

[]:             Quote Post by Ejinathan » Tue Jan 09, 2007 11:33 am this is not about nge 2 what i'm talking here but: Ye in the manga Shinji don't really like Asuka anyway.... She has a double personality that's kinda rotten to him. Anyway Asuka loves Kaji ... Rei on the other part is nice to Shinji, doesn't yell at him like for no reason... The magic was when she smiled to him,but she's also lonely as him.. i understand such things between people. Sharing lonelyness ... Still it was given also that Rei loves Shinji, remember that angel in the anime too.... Rei: Is this my hearth ? To be one with Shinji Ikari... No! (even if she loves him, she can't and i kinda understand her position)

[]:             Quote Post by TriLink » Mon Jan 29, 2007 3:59 pm Ejinathan wrote: Ye in the manga Shinji don't really like Asuka anyway.... She has a double personality that's kinda rotten to him. Anyway Asuka loves Kaji ...

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Jan 29, 2007 6:33 pm Pretty much agree with what trilink says about the manga, even if Shinji doesn't LOVE Asuka as he does in the anime (and vice-versa), at least they care about eachother. Though the (parapharsed) manga line of "This empty shell isn't the Asuka I want to protect!" is curious. I would find it stupid for Sadamoto, who's been building up to Shinji/Rei, to suddenly take the Shinji/Asuka route, UNLESS it's explained well/executed in a manner that makes sense. ie: the whole Rei=Lilith and has Yui's DNA and thus can't be with him would work well (as long as it's done well, too) but whatever. Guess we'll just have to see what happens. In terms of this Ikari Shinji Raising Project manga, is the art/story just as good as GoS2 manga, since both are based on pre-exisiting games? I personally think the GoS2 manga's great; not only do

Article: MANGA ISIK Shipping
 terms of this Ikari Shinji Raising Project manga, is the art/story just as good as GoS2 manga, since both are based on pre-exisiting games? I personally think the GoS2 manga's great; not only do Rei & Asuka become friends (unlike the game), Shinji IS his anime counterpart (unlike the game; which is more or less episode 26 Possible World Shinji; somewhat of an H , as a few of the game's Game Over sequences show. :shock:), but also the overall touch Hayashi gives to it is great.
